title: Nishir Daak
subTitle: When Shreemoyee tries to convince everyone that she was out of the house, nobody including Rudro, believe her. He is convinced that she is lying because he had seen Shreemoyee, who was actually Nishi in disguise.

title: Sadhak Bamakhyapa
subTitle: Bamakhyapa, a saint living in the 18th century, is a great devotee of Goddess Tara. Though he is against the unconventional orthodox temple practices, he uses his divine powers to help the needy.
